title: ALAND's Optimized Hypixel SkyBlock
description: ⚡ A Hypixel SkyBlock modpack that focuses on performance and reliability. Contains all the optimization and QoL mods, ensuring a smooth experience.
body:
**What sets this modpack apart from others:**
- Includes all the essential optimization and QoL mods for Hypixel SkyBlock
- Pre-configured mods with all the necessary features without having 20 obtrusive overlays
- Ready-to-go command macros/keybinds for essential warps and menus
- Fully open source with frequent updates for relevant versions
- Optional resource packs that enhance the general experience
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/plB94X265z4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>💻 Installation Guide & Tips</summary>

**Installation Guide:**

1. Install [Prism Launcher](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CA2fdUzChCo) (HIGHLY RECOMMENDED, It's faster, better, and has a ton of QoL features)
2. In Prism Launcher, click **Add Instance ➞ Modrinth ➞ Type "ALAND" in the Search ➞ Click the Modpack ➞ Click OK**

- **TIP 1:** For Prism users, make sure you select the correct Java version and dedicate at least 4GB of RAM.
- **TIP 2:** Type **/firmament macros** to open the command macros/keybinds. These run commands for Hypixel SkyBlock such as warps and menus.
- **TIP 3:** If you use the Hypixel+ resource pack, then put this inside the JVM arguments field: **-Xss4M**
- **TIP 4:** Don't like a certain mod/feature/resource pack? Just delete/configure it however you like!
</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙️ Mods & Features</summary>

🌎 **Hypixel SkyBlock Mods:**

- [Custom Scoreboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-custom-scoreboard): Adds a customizable scoreboard that resembles SkyHanni's, but with more features
- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament): Small but neat QoL (Item List, Command Macros/Keybinds, NEU Textures, etc.)
- [Odin](https://modrinth.com/mod/odin): Adds Dungeon & Kuudra QoL and solvers, secret routes, and more
- [Skyblock Overhaul (SBO)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-overhaul): Adds Diana helpers and waypoints, plus a dedicated party finder
- [SkyBlock Profile Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-profile-viewer): Adds a /pv command to view player profiles like NEU
- [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap): More QoL not in SkyHanni (Dungeons, Chat Filters, UI & Armor Customization, etc.)
- [SkyHanni](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyhanni): Broad list of QoL features (Garden, Chocolate Factory, Slayer, etc.)
- [SkyOcean](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean): Compact QoL mod (Craft Helper, Item Search Screen, Custom Chest & Vanguard opening, etc.)

⚡️ **Performance Mods:**

- [Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async)
- [AsyncParticles](https://modrinth.com/mod/asyncparticles)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Nvidium](https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium/releases)
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Stfu](https://modrinth.com/mod/shuttfup)
- [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)

❤️ **QoL Mods:**

- [Am I Up To Date?](https://modrinth.com/mod/aiutd): Notifies you when a new modpack update is available
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3): Makes the F3 menu more readable and customizable
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes): Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches): QoL changes and improvements to chat
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders): Allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window
- [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils): Allows toggling fullbright on or off
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu): Adds a mod menu to view and config your mods
- [Nametag Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nametagtweaks): Makes your nametag viewable in third person and more
- [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes): Takes you back to the title screen when you crash
- [Packed Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/packed-packs): Allows drag and dropping and selecting multiple packs in the resource packs menu
- [Quick Connect Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickconnectbutton): Adds a button to quickly join Hypixel from the title screen
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options): Alternative Options Menu for Sodium with QoL improvements
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei): Adds an item list to SkyBlock with search functionality
- [REI Search Bar Calculations](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei-search-bar-calculations): Adds a calculator to REI's search bar
- [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts): Adds a config menu to some resource packs
- [Screencopy](https://modrinth.com/mod/screencopy): Automatically copies screenshots to clipboard
- [Simple Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-menu): Adds custom icons and a Join Discord button plus more to the title screen
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra): Adds most of OptiFine's eye-candy options to Sodium
- [Sound Controller](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-controller): Allows controlling the volume of individual sounds
- [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll): Allows you to move/scroll tooltips
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify): A zoom mod with infinite customizability

📒 **Library Mods (Dependencies):**

- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config)
- [LibJF](https://modrinth.com/mod/libjf)
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
</details>

<details>
<summary>🖼️ Resource Packs</summary>

- [ALAND's Hypixel SkyBlock Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alands-hypixel-skyblock-enchanted-books): Gives Hypixel SkyBlock's enchanted books unique textures
- [Cookie Clicker Click Sound](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cookie-clicker-click-sound): Replaces the menu clicking sound with the one from Cookie Clicker
- [FurSky Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn): Retextures SkyBlock items in an artistic and themed style
- [SkyBlock Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-mode-skyblock): Makes The Mist, The End, Glacite Tunnels, and more places dark
- [SkyBlock Dark UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/skyblock-dark-ui): Makes every menu dark so you don't get flashbanged
- [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true): Retextures the whole game in a faithful vanilla+ style
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/): Tweaks some small stuff like new dye patterns, HD End Flash, and more
</details>

<details>
<summary>❓ FAQ</summary>

**Why did the modpack crash/fail to load?**
- Make sure you select the correct Java version and dedicate at least 4GB of RAM. [Guide](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JP1gQ-rnixM)

**Why is my FPS stuck at 60?**
- VSync is turned on to prevent screen tear artefacts and reduce resource usage, ensuring a smooth experience. You can disable it in the general Video Settings and by configuring the Dynamic FPS mod to turn it off everywhere.

**I'm having FPS issues! How to fix?**
- If you play on a potato, try disabling some/all resource packs, deleting the Roughly Enough Items and REI Search Bar Calculations mod, and further lowering your graphical settings. P.S. Lag during game startup is to be expected, just give it a minute or two to load everything.

**I don't use Prism Launcher, how do I load the modpack?**
- You can use some other launchers like the official Modrinth launcher, NoRisk, and maybe more. However, I'd recommend you install [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/), it's lightweight, super fast, and allows you to download mods/resource packs with ease. It's the best option for modern Minecraft.

**Can I transfer my own config files for x mod?**
- Yes, you can just delete the config file of any mod in the modpack's "config" folder and replace it with your own. This way, you can transfer your own SkyHanni/Skyblocker/other settings over.

**Why did I randomly warp/trigger a command by tapping a random key?**
- These are known as command macros/keybinds. Type **/firmament macros** to open the config menu. You can assign any key and make it run any command you want to make warping/accessing menus easier!

**I have other questions/feedback/issues...**
- Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/J6E8PDdeZj) and feel free to ping me so I can help!
</details>
